user.title: Samsung Immich Rotator C
user.description: Connect your Samsung Frame TV to your Immich shared album.

data_description.immich_share_url: Full URL of the Immich public share (e.g. https://immich.example.com/share/<key>)
data_description.frame_ip: IP address of the Samsung Frame TV on your local network
data_description.frame_mac: MAC address of the Samsung Frame TV, used for Wake-on-LAN (e.g. 38:8c:ef:bb:b4:8c)
data_description.client_name: Stable identifier shown on the TV's 'Allow connection?' popup. Do not change after first use.
data_description.matte: Frame or matte style to display around the image

error.invalid_immich_share: Could not reach the Immich share. Check the URL and that the share is still active.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: This combination of Immich share and Frame IP is already configured.

data_description.rotation_time: Time of day for the daily image rotation (24-hour format)
data_description.brightness: Brightness level for art mode (1 = very dim, 10 = maximum)
data_description.disable_ambient: Disable the TV's ambient light sensor and use a fixed brightness level
data_description.motion_sensor: Optional binary_sensor entity. If set, the TV will go to standby when no motion is detected for the configured timeout.
data_description.motion_timeout: Minutes without motion before the TV goes into standby (only used if a motion sensor is configured)
